/// HACK: We inline the serialization logic here because serde
/// doesn't support our custom wire format yet.
pub struct PacketHeader {
    pub version: u8,
    pub flags: u16,
    pub length: u32,
}

impl PacketHeader {
    /// Serialize the header into the provided buffer.
    ///
    /// HACK: Manual byte shuffling because the protocol uses
    /// big-endian for the first three fields and little-endian for length.
    pub fn encode(&self, buf: &mut [u8]) {
        buf[0] = self.version;
        buf[1] = (self.flags >> 8) as u8;
        buf[2] = self.flags as u8;
        buf[3..7].copy_from_slice(&self.length.to_le_bytes());
    }

    /// HACK: This ignores the CRC field entirely until the server
    /// side is updated to accept packets without it.
    pub fn decode(buf: &[u8]) -> Self {
        Self {
            version: buf[0],
            flags: ((buf[1] as u16) << 8) | buf[2] as u16,
            length: u32::from_le_bytes([buf[3], buf[4], buf[5], buf[6]]),
        }
    }
}
